scenarios.name: a member joins a challenge once and logs at most one entry per day

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_family_fitness_challenge__ffc_challenges (id, name, activity_label, unit_label, mode, start_date, end_date, created_by, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'individual', ?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_family_fitness_challenge__ffc_participants (id, challenge_id, member_id, joined_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_family_fitness_challenge__ffc_participants (id, challenge_id, member_id, joined_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_family_fitness_challenge__ffc_entries (id, challenge_id, member_id, entry_date, amount, visibility, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'everyone', ?)
INSERT INTO app_family_fitness_challenge__ffc_entries (id, challenge_id, member_id, entry_date, amount, visibility, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'everyone', ?)
INSERT INTO app_family_fitness_challenge__ffc_entries (id, challenge_id, member_id, entry_date, amount, visibility, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'everyone', ?)
